scripts.build:agent: npm run build -w @foldops/shared && npm run build -w @foldops/agent
scripts.build:supervisor: npm run build -w @foldops/shared && npm run build -w @foldops/supervisor && npm run build -w @foldops/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @foldops/shared && npm run typecheck -w @foldops/shared && npm run typecheck -w @foldops/agent && npm run typecheck -w @foldops/supervisor && npm run typecheck -w @foldops/web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
